title: As Blazes Spread Near Paris, Extreme Heat Is Changing How France Fights Fires
summary_full: Until recently, France’s forest fires were mostly in the south. This week, fires are raging much farther north. France is having to rethink its firefighting strategy.
summary_public: Until recently, France’s forest fires were mostly in the south. This week, fires are raging much farther north. France is having to rethink its firefighting strategy.

FR.label: negative
FR.evidence: Blazes Spread Near Paris, Extreme Heat
